category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Carla as an audio plugin host
source_facts.description says Carla is an audio plugin host supporting LADSPA, LV2, VST2/3, SF2 and more
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is falkTX/Carla
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points users to the official webpage
source_facts.homepage is the official KXStudio Carla application page
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/falkTX/Carla; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists LADSPA, LV2, VST, audio drivers, and JACK support
source_facts.description lists audio plugin host and plugin formats
